title: Re-derive cycle-948's lost merge-rung2 scoped-review fix (branch conflicts with current main; mergerung2.go diverged)
why: Cycle-948 PASSed but its fix never landed (see ship-landed-verification-floor). The original inbox item merge-rung2-scoped-review was archived as consumed, so nothing re-queues the work. The branch commit 12bab1df now CONFLICTS with main (6459f9ae + c0eabef6 touched mergerung2.go since), so a mechanical cherry-pick is unsafe — the fix must be re-derived against current main using the branch as the reference implementation.
how_to_apply: Read git show 12bab1df on branch cycle-21f9f7ae-948 (production delta is small: ~8 lines mergerung2.go + ~8 lines composition_scoped_review.go + acs predicates). Determine whether later main changes (6459f9ae/c0eabef6) already subsume the fix; if not, reimplement the same intent on current main with fresh ACS predicates. Then delete the branch (it has an unlanded commit — verify_remote_pr_before_branch_delete satisfied once re-derived work lands).
evidence: git show 12bab1df --stat; git log origin/main -- go/internal/core/mergerung2.go
notes: [VERIFY 2026-07-23] Before re-deriving, check whether 6459f9ae/c0eabef6 subsume the ~8-line mergerung2.go delta; branch cycle-21f9f7ae-948 still holds 12bab1df unlanded.
